title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 67.631 - Penalties may be imposed by ordinances for injuries — district's property
text:
67.631.  Penalties may be imposed by ordinances for injuries — district's property. — The legislative authority of any city or county in which any property of a regional cultural and performing arts development district is situated shall have the power to enact ordinances imposing suitable penalties for the punishment of persons committing injury upon such district's property.
(L. 1984 S.B. 709 § 13) 
Effective 5-15-84
